name: Triple Chocolate Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease an 8-inch pie plate.
3. In a small mixing bowl, beat the eggs and blend in the sugar and melted butter.
4. In a separate bowl, stir together flour, cocoa, and salt.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture, beating until blended.
6. Stir in chocolate chips, nuts, and vanilla.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pie plate.
8. Bake for 35 minutes or until set (the center will not be fully cooked).
9. Allow the pie to cool completely.
10. Cut into wedges and serve with ice cream and/or commercial chocolate sauce.
